case_title: PACIFIC TELECOIN, LLC. vs. KONG, CHRISTINA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PACIFIC TELECOIN, LLC.

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2001, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-12-2001, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY JOHN BROWNING, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL ALL OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE PAID., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-27-2001 CONTINUED FROM DEC-12-2001 TO FEB-20-2002 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
